scrapedName: Best of South Vietnam: Saigon, Cu Chi Tunnel & Mekong Delta 5 days

itinerary.title: Arrive in Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description: Landed in Tan Son Nhat Airport in Ho Chi Minh City, our staff pick you up with a warm smile and drive to your hotel in the city center for check-in. As usual, the check-in time is 14:00. If you require early check-in with a surcharge, please book with your travel consultant. Explore Ho Chi Minh by night on your own. Here are some of our recommendations you may refer to

itinerary.title: Crawl Through History - Cu Chi Tunnels & Ho Chi Minh City Tour
itinerary.description:
Morning

Fulfill your breakfast for a busy day. And around 08:00, our car will take you to the Cu Chi Tunnels. Listen to thrilling stories through a movie about the Vietnam War in Cu Chi. Then, walk deep into the underground tunnel and admire the network to understand the life of Vietnamese soldiers during the Vietnam War. For a hands-on experience, try the shooting ranges where you can fire historic weapons like AK-47s (with surcharge)

itinerary.title: Journey to the Mekong Delta - Can Tho
itinerary.description:
Morning

Recharge your energy with breakfast and process checkout. Our transfer and guide will meet you at the lobby for the trip to the mysterious Mekong Delta. Upon arrival at My Tho City, we drop in Vinh Trang Pagoda, the best-known Buddhist temple in Southern Vietnam. Spend three hours rowed sampan by locals into the Mekong River's narrow waterways and mangrove forest. After that, visit some tropical plantations on a nearby island, and watch the natives create coconut candy while sampling some of these delectable treats

itinerary.title: Explore Cai Rang Floating Market at Dawn
itinerary.description:
Morning

You will be picked up from your hotel and taken to the pier to board a wooden boat heading to the Cai Rang floating market, one of the most lively markets in the Mekong Delta. During the boat trip, you’ll get a closer look at local life on the water, stop by a small noodle workshop, and enjoy some fresh tropical fruits as you cruise back. Afternoon

After the visit, you will check out of the hotel and begin the journey back to Ho Chi Minh City. A tasty lunch will be served at the Mekong Rest Stop along the way. The tour ends upon your arrival in Ho Chi Minh City.

itinerary.title: Depart Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description:
Morning 

Enjoy your last breakfast in the hotel. This morning is your free time before taking the departure flight. Besides, capture other Ho Chi Minh hidden places with us in Good Morning Saigon! for only US $35/pax. Please contact your travel consultant to join in this last exciting excursion. Process check out; our transfer will take you to the airport to catch your flight

highlights: Experience the tunnels firsthand, crawling through narrow passages and learning about the Vietnam War in Cu Chi Tunnels.
Interact with local traders and experience the unique atmosphere of the iconic Cai Rang Floating Market.
Take part with your new friends in the group with a unique “xe loi” ride.
included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing except overnight at local homestay or on train
All transport and transfer by air conditioned vehicle (including airport pick up & see off), as per itinerary
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
